description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense border of potted plants, creating a lush green perimeter. The structure features a flat roof with a light tan trim and a predominantly white and dark gray facade, accented by large windows and a spacious patio area. The front entrance is recessed and partially sheltered, with a tiled walkway leading up to it. The landscaping is meticulously arranged, with greenery integrated into the design, including planter boxes and a paved courtyard. The building's clean lines and geometric forms emphasize a contemporary architectural style. The overall impression is one of openness, privacy, and integration with nature.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a lush border of potted plants, featuring a mix of white and dark gray exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, patio area, and dense potted plant border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long white wall, minimal windows, and continuous plant border.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary entrance, more greenery, and a clear view of the flat roof and patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of dark and light wall sections, smaller windows, and the plant border.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
